STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLEMAN, BERNADETTE DANIELS COLEMAN, SINCLAIR COLEMAN, MARISHA, SUED AS GENA COLEMAN, MICHAEL AKA MARCEL COLEMAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 346 EDINBURGH, STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, END OF DAY. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
